raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is free space on the tabletop to the right of box_2 so it can be shifted without colliding with the cup or the table edge; box_2 remains supported on the table during the push.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, creating a small lateral gap between box_1 and box_2 so box_1 has accessible side faces for a dual-arm grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space in front of the boxes on the tabletop to move the cup away from the box_1 grasp/lift path without tipping it into other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is moved forward (toward the robot/front edge of the workspace) and no longer interferes with approaching or lifting box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides with sufficient clearance from box_2 and the cup; both end-effectors can align to opposing side faces at mid-height without contacting the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held with two-arm opposing lateral contact and lifted under control (picked up), no longer resting on the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is free space on the tabletop to the right of box_2 so it can be shifted without colliding with the cup or the table edge; box_2 remains supported on the table during the push.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, creating a small lateral gap between box_1 and box_2 so box_1 has accessible side faces for a dual-arm grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space in front of the boxes on the tabletop to move the cup away from the box_1 grasp/lift path without tipping it into other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is moved forward (toward the robot/front edge of the workspace) and no longer interferes with approaching or lifting box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides with sufficient clearance from box_2 and the cup; both end-effectors can align to opposing side faces at mid-height without contacting the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held with two-arm opposing lateral contact and lifted under control (picked up), no longer resting on the table.
